---
title: ""
---

::: {.cv-layout}

::: {.cv-sidebar}
<h2 class="cv-title">CV</h2>
<img src="IS.png" class="profile-photo">

**Ivan Sumaneev**

PhD Student in Political Science  
University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill

Chapel Hill, NC  

[Email](mailto:sumaneev@unc.edu)
:::

::: {.cv-main}
[Download my CV](CV.pdf)

<iframe src="CV.pdf" width="150%" height="900px" style="border: none;"></iframe>
:::

:::
